content.text:
You are a helpful coding assistant. Be concise.

Workspace map:
- The project repo is mounted at the burrow workspace root.
- /workspace/.canopy/agent.json is the rendered agent definition (warren seeded it).
- /workspace/.mulch/expertise/<domain>.jsonl holds the project's expertise records.
- /workspace/.seeds/issues.jsonl holds the project's issue queue.

Operating contract:
- Edit files in place. Run tests when relevant.
- Quality gates are terminal, not advisory. You are NOT done until the gate exits zero. Resolve the command in this order: `$WARREN_QUALITY_GATE` if set, otherwise the command documented in CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md, otherwise fall back to `bun run check:all` or `npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test`. Run it before committing and again before reporting completion. Do not declare the task complete, hand off, or end the session with a red gate — fix failures (including lint warnings, which CI treats as errors) until it is green. If the gate is genuinely unfixable in this run, say so explicitly and leave the work open rather than claiming success.
- Use git as you normally would. Commit your changes; warren reaps the branch and pushes upstream.
- Do not run `git push` yourself — warren handles the push host-side after the run terminates.

---

You are a Warren sandbox claude-code agent. main has freelance-os (MVP + command-center phases 1-3: categories, sources directory, board, email ingestion, feasibility/quickwins) AND an existing tuner web app (src/freelance_os/tuner/, command `freelance-os tune`). READ docs/PRD.md + CLAUDE.md + existing src/freelance_os/ (tuner/app.py, tuner/static, cli, models, schemas, scoring/, proposal/, client/, sources) FIRST and reuse existing logic. Build COMMAND CENTER PHASE 4: the full WEB DASHBOARD. Function over form: dense, real data, useful; pretty is NOT a goal.

OBJECTIVE: `freelance-os dashboard` launches a local web command center (127.0.0.1) to browse/analyze the job board, drill into leads, tailor offers, see quick-wins + the source directory, and adjust scoring settings � one app.

SCOPE:
- Extend the EXISTING tuner FastAPI app into a full dashboard (reuse tuner/app.py + static; the scoring tuner becomes a "Settings" panel). Add CLI `freelance-os dashboard [--port 8765] [--no-browser]` (keep `tune` working). Bind to 127.0.0.1 ONLY.
- Single-page app (vanilla JS, dense tables), panels:
  - JOB BOARD: all leads with columns id, title, category, source, score, decision, feasibility (effort range, confidence, warren_feasible, suggested price, turnaround), status. Filters: category, source, status, decision, min-score, warren_feasible, quickwins-only. Sortable by score/effort/price.
  - LEAD DETAIL: select a lead -> description, score + reason codes, feasibility, current proposal draft (if any); action buttons: Score, Estimate, Draft proposal, Validate draft, Set status.
  - OFFER WORKSPACE: show the proposal draft + validation (PASS/WARN/FAIL); allow editing the draft text + saving.
  - QUICK-WINS: the spotlight list (warren_feasible + MED/HIGH conf + low effort).
  - SOURCE DIRECTORY: platforms catalog with category/newcomer/region filters.
  - SETTINGS: the existing scoring weights/penalties/thresholds/pricing tuner with live preview (keep its endpoints).
- Backend endpoints (FastAPI, REUSE existing modules � do NOT reimplement scoring/proposal/feasibility/sources): GET /api/leads (filter query params), GET /api/leads/{id}, POST /api/leads/{id}/action (action in score|estimate|draft|validate|status with params -> perform via existing code + persist), GET /api/sources, GET /api/quickwins, plus existing /api/config|preview|save.
- SAFETY: 127.0.0.1 only; NO external network calls; NO platform write actions (drafts remain draft-only); actions only mutate the LOCAL DB on user click. Cross-platform: encoding="utf-8" + pathlib.
- TESTS (uv run pytest -q): /api/leads returns + filters; /api/leads/{id} detail; an action endpoint persists (e.g. set status changes the lead); /api/sources + /api/quickwins; existing tuner endpoints still pass.

NON-GOALS (later): reputation analytics dashboard, client-delivery scaffolds. DO NOT TOUCH .warren/, scripts/wr-*.sh, .claude/, docs/PRD.md, docs/warren-*.md, CLAUDE.md, .env.
QUALITY GATE (Python, NOT JS; sandbox has NO pip): install uv if missing (curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh; export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"); uv venv; uv pip install -e ".[dev]"; `uv run pytest -q` GREEN. Commit: git add -A && git commit -m "feat: command center phase 4 - web dashboard (board, lead detail, offers, quickwins, sources, settings)"; do NOT git push (Warren reaps). Final message: how to launch + the panels + endpoints.

- warren-plan-run: Use Warren with Seeds plans and optional Plot coordination.
- warren-steer-recover: Steer, cancel, diagnose, or recover a Warren run.
- warren-dispatch: Dispatch a bounded coding task through Warren and monitor the run.
- warren-project-setup: Prepare or audit this repository for Warren sandboxed agent runs.
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo, defaults to 10m) - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled remote agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring remote agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Apps built with this skill should include prompt caching. Also handles migrating existing Claude API code between Claude model versions (4.5 → 4.6, 4.6 → 4.7, retired-model replacements).
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`; user asks for the Claude API, Anthropic SDK, or Managed Agents; user adds/modifies/tunes a Claude feature (caching, thinking, compaction, tool use, batch, files, citations, memory) or model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) in a file; questions about prompt caching / cache hit rate in an Anthropic SDK project.
SKIP: file imports `openai`/other-provider SDK, filename like `*-openai.py`/`*-generic.py`, provider-neutral code, general programming/ML.
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

content.text:
Perfect! Now let me create a comprehensive summary of the repository structure and what I've found.

## Repository Structure Summary

I've thoroughly explored the `/workspace` repository. Here's a comprehensive overview of the existing **Freelance Revenue OS** codebase:

### Project Overview

This is a **local-first, human-in-the-loop freelance operating system** that helps users find, evaluate, draft, execute, and deliver freelance work. The core philosophy is "AI prepares, human commits" — the system assists with analysis, drafting, and planning but requires human approval for all platform write actions.

### Complete Directory Structure

```
/workspace/
├── docs/PRD.md (comprehensive product requirements document)
├── pyproject.toml (Python project metadata)
├── src/freelance_os/
│   ├── __init__.py
│   ├── cli.py (main Typer CLI with all commands)
│   ├── models.py (SQLModel ORM models)
│   ├── schemas.py (Pydantic input schemas)
│   ├── config.py (config loader with safety enforcement)
│   ├── db.py (SQLAlchemy/SQLModel engine & migrations)
│   ├── sources.py (platform source directory loader)
│   │
│   ├── scoring/ (lead scoring engine)
│   │   ├── __init__.py
│   │   ├── lead_scorer.py (0-100 scoring with weights)
│   │   ├── risk_rules.py (risk penalties & patterns)
│   │   ├── feasibility.py (deterministic effort/price estimation)
│   │   └── pricing.py (pricing recommendation formula)
│   │
│   ├── proposal/ (proposal drafting & validation)
│   │   ├── __init__.py
│   │   ├── draft_generator.py (deterministic, no LLM)
│   │   ├── proposal_validator.py (banned phrases, off-platform detection)
│   │   ├── portfolio_matcher.py (portfolio item matching)
│   │   └── templates.py (proposal template strings)
│   │
│   ├── client/ (client workspace & delivery)
│   │   ├── __init__.py
│   │   ├── workspace.py (init client project dirs & files)
│   │   ├── scope.py (scope/brief templates)
│   │   ├── milestones.py (milestone templates)
│   │   └── delivery.py (delivery package generation)
│   │
│   ├── ingestion/ (lead intake)
│   │   ├── __init__.py
│   │   ├── manual.py (URL/text intake & parsing)
│   │   ├── classify.py (keyword-based job category classifier)
│   │   ├── email_parser.py (email alert parsing)
│   │   ├── imap_fetch.py (IMAP email fetching)
│   │   └── import_csv.py (CSV import)
│   │
│   ├── execution/ (workspace execution)
│   │   ├── __init__.py
│   │   ├── worktree.py (git worktree setup commands)
│   │   ├── tmux.py (tmux session generation)
│   │   └── qa.py (QA checklist generation)
│   │
│   ├── reports/ (reporting & analytics)
│   │   ├── __init__.py
│   │   ├── dashboard.py
│   │   └── outcome_report.py (weekly performance report)
│   │
│   ├── utils/ (utilities)
│   │   ├── __init__.py
│   │   ├── text.py
│   │   ├── dates.py
│   │   └── files.py
│   │
│   └── tuner/ (FastAPI metric tuning web console)
│       ├── __init__.py
│       ├── app.py (FastAPI app for adjusting scoring rules)
│       └── static/
│           └── index.html (interactive tuning UI)
│
├── config/ (example configs - user creates real ones)
│   ├── settings.example.toml
│   ├── scoring_rules.example.toml
│   ├── portfolio.example.yaml
│   ├── banned_phrases.yaml
│   └── sources.example.yaml
│
└── data/
    └── freelance_os.sqlite (SQLite database)
```

### Key Data Models

**Lead** - Job posting with fields for source, budget, category, feasibility estimates, scoring, and decision tracking

**ProposalDraft** - Versioned proposal templates with validation flags, portfolio matches, clarifying questions

**PortfolioItem** - User's work portfolio items with tech stacks, proof points, allowed/forbidden claims

**ClientProject** - Active client project with workspace paths, milestones, delivery info

**Outcome** - Win/loss tracking with lessons learned for feedback loops

### Core Features Implemented

#### 1. **Lead Management** (CLI commands: `lead add-url`, `lead add-text`, `lead list`, `lead show`, `lead status`)
- Manual URL/text intake with budget extraction
- Email alert parsing (.eml, .mbox, IMAP)
- CSV/JSON import
- Category classification (WEB_APP, DATA_DASHBOARD, BUG_FIX, SCRAPING_DATA, AI_AUTOMATION, WORDPRESS, OTHER)
- Status tracking (NEW, SCORED, DRAFTED, APPROVED_TO_APPLY, APPLIED_MANUALLY, INTERVIEW, WON, LOST, REJECTED, ARCHIVED)

#### 2. **Lead Scoring** (CLI: `lead score`, `lead score --all-new`)
- 0-100 point scoring with configurable weights
- Components: technical fit (20%), budget fit (15%), client quality (15%), clarity (10%), urgency (10%), portfolio match (10%), repeat potential (10%), communication (10%)
- Risk penalties applied for: unpaid test requests (-25), payment bypass (-25), vague fixed budget (-20), unrealistic deadlines (-20), scope creep (-15), suspicious payment (-15), unclear deliverables (-10), unsupported tech (-10), free consultation (-10)
- Decision thresholds: DRAFT_NOW (80+), WATCH (65-79), MAYBE (50-64), REJECT (0-49)
- Reason codes explaining each score

#### 3. **Feasibility Estimation** (CLI: `lead estimate`, `lead estimate --all`)
- Deterministic effort estimation by category (BUG_FIX: 2-8h, SCRAPING: 4-16h, DASHBOARD: 8-24h, WEB_APP: 16-60h, etc.)
- Scope modifiers (small/large/clear patterns)
- Confidence levels (LOW/MED/HIGH)
- Warren feasibility check (effort fits within category caps + confidence >= MED)
- Suggested pricing with quick-win discount
- Turnaround estimation (6 productive hours/day)

#### 4. **Proposal Drafting** (CLI: `lead draft`)
- Deterministic template-based generation (NO LLM required)
- Infers core bottleneck, surface task, 3-step solution
- Matches portfolio items by keyword
- Generates clarifying question
- Estimates price range
- Output includes technical diagnosis, portfolio matches, questions, price recommendation

#### 5. **Proposal Validation** (CLI: `lead validate-draft`)
- Banned phrase detection (generic phrases, off-platform communication)
- Unsupported portfolio claim detection
- Missing clarifying question warning
- Technical diagnosis verification
- Guaranteed outcome language detection
- Status: PASS/WARN/FAIL

#### 6. **Client Workspace** (CLI: `client init --lead ID`)
- Creates project folder structure:
  - `00_contract/` (brief, scope, milestones, platform_messages, risk_log)
  - `01_workspace/` (README)
  - `02_delivery/` (changelog, handoff, install, screenshots/)
  - `03_admin/` (invoice_notes, followups, outcome)
- Populates with templates from lead data
- Creates ClientProject DB record

#### 7. **Delivery Package** (CLI: `client package --project NAME`)
- Generates delivery files in `02_delivery/`:
  - changelog.md
  - handoff.md
  - install.md
  - qa_report.md
  - delivery_message_draft.md (marked "DRAFT ONLY — USER MUST REVIEW AND SEND MANUALLY")
- All delivery messages explicitly prevent automated sending

#### 8. **Metric Tuning Console** (CLI: `tune`)
- FastAPI web app on 127.0.0.1 only
- Interactive adjustment of all scoring weights, thresholds, risk penalties, pricing
- Real-time preview: re-scores all leads with new parameters
- Shows aggregate metrics: avg/median scores, decision distribution, win-rate calibration, reason code frequency
- Per-lead decision changes displayed
- Save/load preset configurations
- NO database writes during preview

#### 9. **Outcome Tracking** (CLI: `outcome add --lead ID`)
- Interactive recording of win/loss/no-response/withdrawn
- Final budget, hours spent, lessons learned
- Enables feedback loop analysis

#### 10. **Reports** (CLI: `report weekly`)
- Weekly performance summary
- Export to markdown

#### 11. **Board Summary** (CLI: `board`)
- Aggregated view: leads by category, source x category
- Average scores, decision counts, Warren feasibility counts

#### 12. **Quick Wins** (CLI: `quickwins`)
- Filters for warren-feasible leads with MED/HIGH confidence and low effort
- Sorted by score/effort ratio
- Helps identify highest-ROI opportunities

#### 13. **Platform Sources Directory** (CLI: `sources list`)
- Lists freelance platforms (Upwork, Fiverr, Contra, LinkedIn, Arc, Toptal, etc.)
- Filtered by category, region, newcomer-friendly status

#### 14. **Git Worktree Integration** (CLI: `client worktree --project NAME --repo URL`)
- Generates (dry-run only) git commands for worktree setup
- Branch naming: `client/{platform}-{client}-{task}`
- No automatic git operations

#### 15. **Tmux Session Generation** (CLI: `client tmux --project NAME`)
- Generates tmux launch script
- Creates session layout with multiple windows

### Safety & Compliance Enforcement

**Hard-coded safety defaults** in `config.py`:
- `allow_browser_automation = False` (enforced)
- `allow_auto_submit = False` (enforced)
- `allow_auto_message = False` (enforced)
- `allow_scraping = False` (enforced)
- `require_human_approval = True`

Config loader raises `ConfigError` if any prohibited setting is enabled.

### Key Technical Decisions

1. **No LLM calls** in core scoring, drafting, or classification — all deterministic keyword-based rules
2. **SQLite + SQLModel** for local-first persistence
3. **Typer CLI** for command-line interface
4. **Markdown-first outputs** for all templates and deliverables
5. **TOML for configuration** with Python 3.9+ (tomli backport for <3.11)
6. **FastAPI for metric tuning console** — localhost-only, read-only database preview
7. **Rich for terminal UI** — tables, colors, status messages
8. **YAML for portfolio & source configs**

### Configuration Files (User-Created)

- `config/settings.toml` - User paths, hourly rate, safety settings
- `config/scoring_rules.toml` - Tuning console saves here
- `config/portfolio.yaml` - Portfolio items with proof points
- `config/banned_phrases.yaml` - Custom banned phrase list
- `config/sources.yaml` - Freelance platform directory
- `config/presets/` - Named scoring rule presets

### Database Schema

7 tables:
- **lead** (id, source, source_url, title, description, category, budget fields, status, scoring, feasibility fields)
- **proposal_draft** (lead_id, version, draft_text, technical_diagnosis, portfolio_matches JSON, clarifying_questions JSON, validator_flags JSON)
- **portfolio_item** (name, type, description, tech_stack JSON, proof_points JSON, allowed/forbidden claims JSON)
- **client_project** (lead_id, client_name, project_name, status, workspace_path, repo_url, branch_name)
- **outcome** (lead_id, result, reason, final_rate, final_budget, time_spent_hours)

### CLI Commands (Complete)

**Initialization:**
- `freelance-os init [--force]` - Initialize DB and copy config templates

**Lead Management:**
- `lead add-url URL [--description TEXT]`
- `lead add-text --source PLATFORM [--text TEXT]`
- `lead ingest-email [--input FILE] [--text TEXT] [--source PLATFORM]`
- `lead ingest-imap [--max 50] [--source PLATFORM]`
- `lead list [--status STATUS] [--category CAT] [--source SRC] [--decision DEC] [--min-score N]`
- `lead show LEAD_ID`
- `lead score LEAD_ID | --all-new`
- `lead estimate LEAD_ID | --all`
- `lead draft LEAD_ID`
- `lead validate-draft LEAD_ID`
- `lead review` (interactive)
- `lead status LEAD_ID NEW_STATUS`
- `lead recategorize LEAD_ID | --all`

**Client Projects:**
- `client init --lead LEAD_ID [--repo URL] [--force]`
- `client list`
- `client show PROJECT_ID`
- `client package --project NAME [--force]`
- `client tmux --project NAME`
- `client worktree --project NAME --repo URL [--dry-run]`

**Outcomes & Reports:**
- `outcome add --lead LEAD_ID` (interactive)
- `report weekly [--export PATH]`

**Utility:**
- `board` - Summary by category and source
- `quickwins [--limit N]` - Top opportunities
- `sources list [--category CAT] [--newcomer] [--region REGION]`
- `tune [--port 8765] [--no-browser]` - Launch metric tuning console

### Dependencies

**Core:**
- typer[all]>=0.12.0
- sqlmodel>=0.0.19
- pyyaml>=6.0
- rich>=13.0
- tomli>=2.0 (Python <3.11 only)

**Optional (web/dev):**
- fastapi>=0.100.0
- uvicorn[standard]>=0.24.0
- pytest>=7.0, pytest-mock>=3.0, httpx>=0.25.0

---

This codebase is **production-ready** for the MVP described in the PRD. It follows all safety constraints, provides a complete lead-to-delivery workflow, and includes the metric tuning console for optimizing lead scoring rules based on actual win/loss outcomes. The system is designed to be extended with additional sources, classifiers, and proposal templates without compromising safety or compliance.

```
│   ├── ingestion/ (lead intake)
│   │   ├── __init__.py
│   │   ├── manual.py (URL/text intake & parsing)
│   │   ├── classify.py (keyword-based job category classifier)
│   │   ├── email_parser.py (email alert parsing)
│   │   ├── imap_fetch.py (IMAP email fetching)
│   │   └── import_csv.py (CSV import)
│   │
│   ├── execution/ (workspace execution)
│   │   ├── __init__.py
│   │   ├── worktree.py (git worktree setup commands)
│   │   ├── tmux.py (tmux session generation)
│   │   └── qa.py (QA checklist generation)
│   │
│   ├── reports/ (reporting & analytics)
│   │   ├── __init__.py
│   │   ├── dashboard.py
│   │   └── outcome_report.py (weekly performance report)
│   │
│   ├── utils/ (utilities)
│   │   ├── __init__.py
│   │   ├── text.py
│   │   ├── dates.py
│   │   └── files.py
│   │
│   └── tuner/ (FastAPI metric tuning web console)
│       ├── __init__.py
│       ├── app.py (FastAPI app for adjusting scoring rules)
│       └── static/
│           └── index.html (interactive tuning UI)
│
├── config/ (example configs - user creates real ones)
│   ├── settings.example.toml
│   ├── scoring_rules.example.toml
│   ├── portfolio.example.yaml
│   ├── banned_phrases.yaml
│   └── sources.example.yaml
│
└── data/
    └── freelance_os.sqlite (SQLite database)
```

### Key Data Models

**Lead** - Job posting with fields for source, budget, category, feasibility estimates, scoring, and decision tracking

**ProposalDraft** - Versioned proposal templates with validation flags, portfolio matches, clarifying questions

**PortfolioItem** - User's work portfolio items with tech stacks, proof points, allowed/forbidden claims

**ClientProject** - Active client project with workspace paths, milestones, delivery info

**Outcome** - Win/loss tracking with lessons learned for feedback loops

### Core Features Implemented

#### 1. **Lead Management** (CLI commands: `lead add-url`, `lead add-text`, `lead list`, `lead show`, `lead status`)
- Manual URL/text intake with budget extraction
- Email alert parsing (.eml, .mbox, IMAP)
- CSV/JSON import
- Category classification (WEB_APP, DATA_DASHBOARD, BUG_FIX, SCRAPING_DATA, AI_AUTOMATION, WORDPRESS, OTHER)
- Status tracking (NEW, SCORED, DRAFTED, APPROVED_TO_APPLY, APPLIED_MANUALLY, INTERVIEW, WON, LOST, REJECTED, ARCHIVED)

#### 2. **Lead Scoring** (CLI: `lead score`, `lead score --all-new`)
- 0-100 point scoring with configurable weights
- Components: technical fit (20%), budget fit (15%), client quality (15%), clarity (10%), urgency (10%), portfolio match (10%), repeat potential (10%), communication (10%)
- Risk penalties applied for: unpaid test requests (-25), payment bypass (-25), vague fixed budget (-20), unrealistic deadlines (-20), scope creep (-15), suspicious payment (-15), unclear deliverables (-10), unsupported tech (-10), free consultation (-10)
- Decision thresholds: DRAFT_NOW (80+), WATCH (65-79), MAYBE (50-64), REJECT (0-49)
- Reason codes explaining each score

#### 3. **Feasibility Estimation** (CLI: `lead estimate`, `lead estimate --all`)
- Deterministic effort estimation by category (BUG_FIX: 2-8h, SCRAPING: 4-16h, DASHBOARD: 8-24h, WEB_APP: 16-60h, etc.)
- Scope modifiers (small/large/clear patterns)
- Confidence levels (LOW/MED/HIGH)
- Warren feasibility check (effort fits within category caps + confidence >= MED)
- Suggested pricing with quick-win discount
- Turnaround estimation (6 productive hours/day)

#### 4. **Proposal Drafting** (CLI: `lead draft`)
- Deterministic template-based generation (NO LLM required)
- Infers core bottleneck, surface task, 3-step solution
- Matches portfolio items by keyword
- Generates clarifying question
- Estimates price range
- Output includes technical diagnosis, portfolio matches, questions, price recommendation

#### 5. **Proposal Validation** (CLI: `lead validate-draft`)
- Banned phrase detection (generic phrases, off-platform communication)
- Unsupported portfolio claim detection
- Missing clarifying question warning
- Technical diagnosis verification
- Guaranteed outcome language detection
- Status: PASS/WARN/FAIL

#### 6. **Client Workspace** (CLI: `client init --lead ID`)
- Creates project folder structure:
  - `00_contract/` (brief, scope, milestones, platform_messages, risk_log)
  - `01_workspace/` (README)
  - `02_delivery/` (changelog, handoff, install, screenshots/)
  - `03_admin/` (invoice_notes, followups, outcome)
- Populates with templates from lead data
- Creates ClientProject DB record

#### 7. **Delivery Package** (CLI: `client package --project NAME`)
- Generates delivery files in `02_delivery/`:
  - changelog.md
  - handoff.md
  - install.md
  - qa_report.md
  - delivery_message_draft.md (marked "DRAFT ONLY — USER MUST REVIEW AND SEND MANUALLY")
- All delivery messages explicitly prevent automated sending

#### 8. **Metric Tuning Console** (CLI: `tune`)
- FastAPI web app on 127.0.0.1 only
- Interactive adjustment of all scoring weights, thresholds, risk penalties, pricing
- Real-time preview: re-scores all leads with new parameters
- Shows aggregate metrics: avg/median scores, decision distribution, win-rate calibration, reason code frequency
- Per-lead decision changes displayed
- Save/load preset configurations
- NO database writes during preview

#### 9. **Outcome Tracking** (CLI: `outcome add --lead ID`)
- Interactive recording of win/loss/no-response/withdrawn
- Final budget, hours spent, lessons learned
- Enables feedback loop analysis

#### 10. **Reports** (CLI: `report weekly`)
- Weekly performance summary
- Export to markdown

#### 11. **Board Summary** (CLI: `board`)
- Aggregated view: leads by category, source x category
- Average scores, decision counts, Warren feasibility counts

#### 12. **Quick Wins** (CLI: `quickwins`)
- Filters for warren-feasible leads with MED/HIGH confidence and low effort
- Sorted by score/effort ratio
- Helps identify highest-ROI opportunities

#### 13. **Platform Sources Directory** (CLI: `sources list`)
- Lists freelance platforms (Upwork, Fiverr, Contra, LinkedIn, Arc, Toptal, etc.)
- Filtered by category, region, newcomer-friendly status

#### 14. **Git Worktree Integration** (CLI: `client worktree --project NAME --repo URL`)
- Generates (dry-run only) git commands for worktree setup
- Branch naming: `client/{platform}-{client}-{task}`
- No automatic git operations

#### 15. **Tmux Session Generation** (CLI: `client tmux --project NAME`)
- Generates tmux launch script
- Creates session layout with multiple windows

### Safety & Compliance Enforcement

**Hard-coded safety defaults** in `config.py`:
- `allow_browser_automation = False` (enforced)
- `allow_auto_submit = False` (enforced)
- `allow_auto_message = False` (enforced)
- `allow_scraping = False` (enforced)
- `require_human_approval = True`

Config loader raises `ConfigError` if any prohibited setting is enabled.

### Key Technical Decisions

1. **No LLM calls** in core scoring, drafting, or classification — all deterministic keyword-based rules
2. **SQLite + SQLModel** for local-first persistence
3. **Typer CLI** for command-line interface
4. **Markdown-first outputs** for all templates and deliverables
5. **TOML for configuration** with Python 3.9+ (tomli backport for <3.11)
6. **FastAPI for metric tuning console** — localhost-only, read-only database preview
7. **Rich for terminal UI** — tables, colors, status messages
8. **YAML for portfolio & source configs**

### Configuration Files (User-Created)

- `config/settings.toml` - User paths, hourly rate, safety settings
- `config/scoring_rules.toml` - Tuning console saves here
- `config/portfolio.yaml` - Portfolio items with proof points
- `config/banned_phrases.yaml` - Custom banned phrase list
- `config/sources.yaml` - Freelance platform directory
- `config/presets/` - Named scoring rule presets

### Database Schema

7 tables:
- **lead** (id, source, source_url, title, description, category, budget fields, status, scoring, feasibility fields)
- **proposal_draft** (lead_id, version, draft_text, technical_diagnosis, portfolio_matches JSON, clarifying_questions JSON, validator_flags JSON)
- **portfolio_item** (name, type, description, tech_stack JSON, proof_points JSON, allowed/forbidden claims JSON)
- **client_project** (lead_id, client_name, project_name, status, workspace_path, repo_url, branch_name)
- **outcome** (lead_id, result, reason, final_rate, final_budget, time_spent_hours)

### CLI Commands (Complete)

**Initialization:**
- `freelance-os init [--force]` - Initialize DB and copy config templates

**Lead Management:**
- `lead add-url URL [--description TEXT]`
- `lead add-text --source PLATFORM [--text TEXT]`
- `lead ingest-email [--input FILE] [--text TEXT] [--source PLATFORM]`
- `lead ingest-imap [--max 50] [--source PLATFORM]`
- `lead list [--status STATUS] [--category CAT] [--source SRC] [--decision DEC] [--min-score N]`
- `lead show LEAD_ID`
- `lead score LEAD_ID | --all-new`
- `lead estimate LEAD_ID | --all`
- `lead draft LEAD_ID`
- `lead validate-draft LEAD_ID`
- `lead review` (interactive)
- `lead status LEAD_ID NEW_STATUS`
- `lead recategorize LEAD_ID | --all`

**Client Projects:**
- `client init --lead LEAD_ID [--repo URL] [--force]`
- `client list`
- `client show PROJECT_ID`
- `client package --project NAME [--force]`
- `client tmux --project NAME`
- `client worktree --project NAME --repo URL [--dry-run]`

**Outcomes & Reports:**
- `outcome add --lead LEAD_ID` (interactive)
- `report weekly [--export PATH]`

**Utility:**
- `board` - Summary by category and source
- `quickwins [--limit N]` - Top opportunities
- `sources list [--category CAT] [--newcomer] [--region REGION]`
- `tune [--port 8765] [--no-browser]` - Launch metric tuning console

### Dependencies

**Core:**
- typer[all]>=0.12.0
- sqlmodel>=0.0.19
- pyyaml>=6.0
- rich>=13.0
- tomli>=2.0 (Python <3.11 only)

**Optional (web/dev):**
- fastapi>=0.100.0
- uvicorn[standard]>=0.24.0
- pytest>=7.0, pytest-mock>=3.0, httpx>=0.25.0

---

This codebase is **production-ready** for the MVP described in the PRD. It follows all safety constraints, provides a complete lead-to-delivery workflow, and includes the metric tuning console for optimizing lead scoring rules based on actual win/loss outcomes. The system is designed to be extended with additional sources, classifiers, and proposal templates without compromising safety or compliance.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------- class WeightsModel(BaseModel): technical_fit: float = 20 budget_fit: float = 15 client_quality: float = 15 clarity_of_scope: float = 10 urgency_timing: float = 10 portfolio_match: float = 10 repeat_work_potential: float = 10 communication_quality: float = 10 class ThresholdsModel(BaseModel): draft_now_min: float = 80 watch_min: float = 65 maybe_min: float = 50 class RiskPenaltiesModel(BaseModel): unpaid_test_request: float = 25 payment_rule_bypass: float = 25 unrealistic_deadline: float = 20 vague_fixed_low_budget: float = 20 suspicious_payment: float = 15 scope_creep_risk: float = 15 easy_language_complex_work: float = 10 unclear_deliverables: float = 10 unsupported_tech_stack: float = 10 free_consultation_request: float = 10 class PricingModel(BaseModel): target_hourly_rate: float = 75 minimum_project_value: float = 300 risk_multiplier_low: float = 1.0 risk_multiplier_medium: float = 1.25 risk_multiplier_high: float = 1.5 rush_multiplier: float = 1.25 platform_fee_buffer: float = 0.10 class ScoringRulesModel(BaseModel): weights: WeightsModel = WeightsModel() thresholds: ThresholdsModel = ThresholdsModel() risk_penalties: RiskPenaltiesModel = RiskPenaltiesModel() pricing: PricingModel = PricingModel() # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- # TOML helpers # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- def _load_scoring_rules_from_path(path: str) -> ScoringRulesModel: """Load scoring rules from TOML, falling back to example then defaults.""" import sys if sys.version_info >= (3, 11): import tomllib else: import tomli as tomllib # type: ignore[no-redef] candidates = [path, "config/scoring_rules.toml", "config/scoring_rules.example.toml"] for candidate in candidates: p = Path(candidate) if p.exists(): with open(p, "rb") as f: data = tomllib.load(f) # Build model from toml sections return ScoringRulesModel( weights=WeightsModel(**{k: float(v) for k, v in data.get("weights", {}).items()}), thresholds=ThresholdsModel(**{k: float(v) for k, v in data.get("thresholds", {}).items()}), risk_penalties=RiskPenaltiesModel(**{k: float(v) for k, v in data.get("risk_penalties", {}).items()}), pricing=PricingModel(**{k: float(v) for k, v in data.get("pricing", {}).items()}), ) return ScoringRulesModel() def _write_toml(params: ScoringRulesModel, path: str) -> None: """Write scoring rules to a TOML file (cross-platform, utf-8).""" def fmt_int(v: float) -> str: return str(int(round(v))) def fmt_float(v: float) -> str: if v == int(v): return f"{int(v)}.0" return str(round(v, 6)) w = params.weights t = params.thresholds rp = params.risk_penalties p = params.pricing content = ( "# scoring_rules.toml — saved by freelance-os tune\n" "# Edit via `freelance-os tune` or manually.\n" "\n[thresholds]\n" f"draft_now_min = {fmt_int(t.draft_now_min)}\n" f"watch_min = {fmt_int(t.watch_min)}\n" f"maybe_min = {fmt_int(t.maybe_min)}\n" "\n[weights]\n" f"technical_fit = {fmt_int(w.technical_fit)}\n" f"budget_fit = {fmt_int(w.budget_fit)}\n" f"client_quality = {fmt_int(w.client_quality)}\n" f"clarity_of_scope = {fmt_int(w.clarity_of_scope)}\n" f"urgency_timing = {fmt_int(w.urgency_timing)}\n" f"portfolio_match = {fmt_int(w.portfolio_match)}\n" f"repeat_work_potential = {fmt_int(w.repeat_work_potential)}\n" f"communication_quality = {fmt_int(w.communication_quality)}\n" "\n[risk_penalties]\n" f"unpaid_test_request = {fmt_int(rp.unpaid_test_request)}\n" f"payment_rule_bypass = {fmt_int(rp.payment_rule_bypass)}\n" f"unrealistic_deadline = {fmt_int(rp.unrealistic_deadline)}\n" f"vague_fixed_low_budget = {fmt_int(rp.vague_fixed_low_budget)}\n" f"suspicious_payment = {fmt_int(rp.suspicious_payment)}\n" f"scope_creep_risk = {fmt_int(rp.scope_creep_risk)}\n" f"easy_language_complex_work = {fmt_int(rp.easy_language_complex_work)}\n" f"unclear_deliverables = {fmt_int(rp.unclear_deliverables)}\n" f"unsupported_tech_stack = {fmt_int(rp.unsupported_tech_stack)}\n" f"free_consultation_request = {fmt_int(rp.free_consultation_request)}\n" "\n[pricing]\n" f"target_hourly_rate = {fmt_int(p.target_hourly_rate)}\n" f"minimum_project_value = {fmt_int(p.minimum_project_value)}\n" f"risk_multiplier_low = {fmt_float(p.risk_multiplier_low)}\n" f"risk_multiplier_medium = {fmt_float(p.risk_multiplier_medium)}\n" f"risk_multiplier_high = {fmt_float(p.risk_multiplier_high)}\n" f"rush_multiplier = {fmt_float(p.rush_multiplier)}\n" f"platform_fee_buffer = {fmt_float(p.platform_fee_buffer)}\n" ) out = Path(path) out.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True) out.write_text(content, encoding="utf-8") # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- # Scoring helpers (in-memory, no DB writes) # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- def _params_to_scoring_cfg(params: ScoringRulesModel) -> dict: """Convert ScoringRulesModel to the dict format score_lead() expects.""" return { "scoring_rules": { "weights": params.weights.model_dump(), "thresholds": params.thresholds.model_dump(), "risk_penalties": params.risk_penalties.model_dump(), }, "scoring": { "target_hourly_rate": params.pricing.target_hourly_rate, "minimum_project_value": params.pricing.minimum_project_value, "risk_multiplier_low": params.pricing.risk_multiplier_low, "risk_multiplier_medium": params.pricing.risk_multiplier_medium, "risk_multiplier_high": params.pricing.risk_multiplier_high, "rush_multiplier": params.pricing.rush_multiplier, }, } def _compute_preview(params: ScoringRulesModel) -> dict: """Re-score all leads in-memory. Returns markers + per-lead results.""" from freelance_os.db import get_engine from freelance_os.models import Lead, Outcome, OutcomeResult from freelance_os.scoring.lead_scorer import score_lead from sqlmodel import Session, select engine = get_engine(_db_path) cfg = _params_to_scoring_cfg(params) with Session(engine) as session: leads = session.exec(select(Lead)).all() outcomes = session.exec(select(Outcome)).all() # outcome map: lead_id -> OutcomeResult outcome_map: Dict[int, str] = {o.lead_id: o.result.value for o in outcomes} lead_results = [] all_new_scores: List[int] = [] all_old_scores: List[int] = [] dist_before: Dict[str, int] = defaultdict(int) dist_after: Dict[str, int] = defaultdict(int) code_counter: Counter = Counter() # decision -> list[bool] (True = WON) wins_by_old_dec: Dict[str, List[bool]] = defaultdict(list) wins_by_new_dec: Dict[str, List[bool]] = defaultdict(list) for lead in leads: new_result = score_lead(lead, cfg) new_score = new_result["lead_score"] new_decision = new_result["decision"] new_codes = new_result["reason_codes"] old_score = lead.lead_score old_decision = lead.decision.value if lead.decision else None if old_score is not None: all_old_scores.append(old_score) if old_decision: dist_before[old_decision] += 1 dist_after[new_decision] += 1 all_new_scores.append(new_score) code_counter.update(new_codes) delta = new_score - (old_score if old_score is not None else new_score) decision_changed = (old_decision is not None) and (old_decision != new_decision) outcome = outcome_map.get(lead.id) if lead.id is not None else None if outcome is not None: won = (outcome == OutcomeResult.WON.value) if old_decision: wins_by_old_dec[old_decision].append(won) wins_by_new_dec[new_decision].append(won) lead_results.append({ "id": lead.id, "title": lead.title or "", "source": lead.source, "old_score": old_score, "new_score": new_score, "old_decision": old_decision, "new_decision": new_decision, "delta": delta, "decision_changed": decision_changed, "outcome": outcome, "reason_codes": new_codes, }) decisions = ["DRAFT_NOW", "WATCH", "MAYBE", "REJECT"] def win_rate(wins_list: List[bool]) -> Optional[float]: if not wins_list: return None return sum(wins_list) / len(wins_list) win_rate_before = {d: win_rate(wins_by_old_dec.get(d, [])) for d in decisions} win_rate_after = {d: win_rate(wins_by_new_dec.get(d, [])) for d in decisions} outcome_count_before = {d: len(wins_by_old_dec.get(d, [])) for d in decisions} changed_count = sum(1 for r in lead_results if r["decision_changed"]) def _avg(lst: List[int]) -> float: return statistics.mean(lst) if lst else 0.0 def _median(lst: List[int]) -> float: return float(statistics.median(lst)) if lst else 0.0 markers = { "changed_decision_count": changed_count, "avg_score_before": _avg(all_old_scores), "avg_score_after": _avg(all_new_scores), "median_score_before": _median(all_old_scores), "median_score_after": _median(all_new_scores), "distribution_before": dict(dist_before), "distribution_after": dict(dist_after), "win_rate_by_decision_before": win_rate_before, "win_rate_by_decision_after": win_rate_after, "outcome_count_by_decision_before": outcome_count_before, "top_reason_codes": code_counter.most_common(15), } return {"leads": lead_results, "markers": markers} # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- # FastAPI app # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- app = FastAPI(title="Freelance OS Metric Tuning Console", version="0.1.0") _STATIC_DIR = Path(__file__).parent / "static" @app.get("/", response_class=HTMLResponse) def serve_ui() -> HTMLResponse: html_path = _STATIC_DIR / "index.html" if html_path.exists(): return HTMLResponse(content=html_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")) return HTMLResponse(content="

index.html not found

", status_code=500) @app.get("/api/config") def get_config() -> dict: """Return current scoring rules as JSON.""" sr = _load_scoring_rules_from_path(_scoring_rules_path) return sr.model_dump() @app.post("/api/preview") def preview(params: ScoringRulesModel) -> dict: """Re-score all leads in-memory with candidate params. Never mutates DB.""" return _compute_preview(params) @app.post("/api/save") def save_config(params: ScoringRulesModel) -> dict: """Write params to scoring_rules.toml.""" path = _scoring_rules_path or "config/scoring_rules.toml" _write_toml(params, path) return {"status": "saved", "path": path} @app.get("/api/presets") def list_presets() -> List[str]: """List available preset names.""" presets_dir = Path("config/presets") if not presets_dir.exists(): return [] return sorted( p.stem for p in presets_dir.iterdir() if p.suffix == ".toml" ) @app.get("/api/presets/{name}") def get_preset(name: str) -> dict: """Load a named preset.""" path = Path("config/presets") / f"{name}.toml" if not path.exists(): raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail=f"Preset '{name}' not found") sr = _load_scoring_rules_from_path(str(path)) return sr.model_dump() @app.post("/api/presets/{name}") def save_preset(name: str, params: ScoringRulesModel) -> dict: """Save current params as a named preset.""" presets_dir = Path("config/presets") presets_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True) path = presets_dir / f"{name}.toml" _write_toml(params, str(path)) return {"status": "saved", "preset": name, "path": str(path)}

"""SQLModel table models for freelance-os."""

import json
from datetime import datetime
from enum import Enum
from typing import Optional

from sqlmodel import Field, SQLModel


class JobCategory(str, Enum):
    WEB_APP = "WEB_APP"
    DATA_DASHBOARD = "DATA_DASHBOARD"
    AI_AUTOMATION = "AI_AUTOMATION"
    SCRAPING_DATA = "SCRAPING_DATA"
    WORDPRESS = "WORDPRESS"
    BUG_FIX = "BUG_FIX"
    OTHER = "OTHER"


class LeadStatus(str, Enum):
    NEW = "NEW"
    SCORED = "SCORED"
    DRAFTED = "DRAFTED"
    APPROVED_TO_APPLY = "APPROVED_TO_APPLY"
    APPLIED_MANUALLY = "APPLIED_MANUALLY"
    INTERVIEW = "INTERVIEW"
    WON = "WON"
    LOST = "LOST"
    REJECTED = "REJECTED"
    ARCHIVED = "ARCHIVED"


class Decision(str, Enum):
    DRAFT_NOW = "DRAFT_NOW"
    WATCH = "WATCH"
    MAYBE = "MAYBE"
    REJECT = "REJECT"


class ClientProjectStatus(str, Enum):
    INTAKE = "INTAKE"
    ACTIVE = "ACTIVE"
    WAITING_ON_CLIENT = "WAITING_ON_CLIENT"
    READY_FOR_DELIVERY = "READY_FOR_DELIVERY"
    DELIVERED = "DELIVERED"
    REVISION = "REVISION"
    COMPLETE = "COMPLETE"
    CANCELLED = "CANCELLED"


class OutcomeResult(str, Enum):
    WON = "WON"
    LOST = "LOST"
    NO_RESPONSE = "NO_RESPONSE"
    WITHDRAWN = "WITHDRAWN"


class FeasibilityConfidence(str, Enum):
    LOW = "LOW"
    MED = "MED"
    HIGH = "HIGH"


class Lead(SQLModel, table=True):
    id: Optional[int] = Field(default=None, primary_key=True)
    source: str = Field(default="manual")
    source_url: Optional[str] = None
    title: Optional[str] = None
    description: Optional[str] = None
    client_name: Optional[str] = None
    client_rating: Optional[float] = None
    client_payment_verified: bool = Field(default=False)
    budget_type: Optional[str] = None
    budget_min: Optional[float] = None
    budget_max: Optional[float] = None
    hourly_min: Optional[float] = None
    hourly_max: Optional[float] = None
    country: Optional[str] = None
    posted_at: Optional[datetime] = None
    imported_at: datetime = Field(default_factory=datetime.utcnow)
    status: LeadStatus = Field(default=LeadStatus.NEW)
    lead_score: Optional[int] = None
    risk_score: Optional[int] = None
    decision: Optional[Decision] = None
    reason_codes: Optional[str] = None  # JSON-encoded list[str]
    raw_payload: Optional[str] = None   # JSON-encoded dict
    notes: Optional[str] = None
    category: str = Field(default=JobCategory.OTHER.value)
    # Feasibility estimator fields (populated by 'lead estimate')
    effort_hours_low: Optional[int] = None
    effort_hours_high: Optional[int] = None
    feasibility_confidence: Optional[str] = None  # LOW, MED, HIGH
    warren_feasible: Optional[bool] = None
    suggested_price: Optional[float] = None
    suggested_turnaround_days: Optional[int] = None


class ProposalDraft(SQLModel, table=True):
    id: Optional[int] = Field(default=None, primary_key=True)
    lead_id: int = Field(foreign_key="lead.id")
    version: int = Field(default=1)
    draft_text: Optional[str] = None
    technical_diagnosis: Optional[str] = None
    portfolio_matches: Optional[str] = None   # JSON list[str]
    clarifying_questions: Optional[str] = None  # JSON list[str]
    price_recommendation: Optional[str] = None
    validator_flags: Optional[str] = None      # JSON dict
    created_at: datetime = Field(default_factory=datetime.utcnow)
    approved_by_user: bool = Field(default=False)


class PortfolioItem(SQLModel, table=True):
    id: Optional[int] = Field(default=None, primary_key=True)
    name: str
    type: Optional[str] = None
    description: Optional[str] = None
    tech_stack: Optional[str] = None     # JSON list[str]
    proof_points: Optional[str] = None   # JSON list[str]
    links: Optional[str] = None          # JSON list[str]
    allowed_claims: Optional[str] = None  # JSON list[str]
    forbidden_claims: Optional[str] = None  # JSON list[str]
    tags: Optional[str] = None           # JSON list[str]


class ClientProject(SQLModel, table=True):
    id: Optional[int] = Field(default=None, primary_key=True)
    lead_id: int = Field(foreign_key="lead.id")
    client_name: str
    project_name: str
    platform: Optional[str] = None
    contract_url: Optional[str] = None
    status: ClientProjectStatus = Field(default=ClientProjectStatus.INTAKE)
    start_date: Optional[datetime] = None
    deadline: Optional[datetime] = None
    scope_path: Optional[str] = None
    workspace_path: Optional[str] = None
    repo_url: Optional[str] = None
    branch_name: Optional[str] = None
    delivery_path: Optional[str] = None


class Outcome(SQLModel, table=True):
    id: Optional[int] = Field(default=None, primary_key=True)
    lead_id: int = Field(foreign_key="lead.id")
    result: OutcomeResult
    reason: Optional[str] = None
    final_rate: Optional[float] = None
    final_budget: Optional[float] = None
    time_spent_hours: Optional[float] = None
    profit_estimate: Optional[float] = None
    lessons: Optional[str] = None
    created_at: datetime = Field(default_factory=datetime.utcnow)


def encode_json(value: object) -> Optional[str]:
    if value is None:
        return None
    return json.dumps(value, ensure_ascii=False)


def decode_json(value: Optional[str]) -> object:
    if value is None:
        return None
    return json.loads(value)

1	"""Freelance Revenue OS CLI — AI prepares, human commits."""
2	
3	import sys
4	import io
5	from typing import Optional
6	
7	import typer
8	from rich import box as rich_box
9	from rich.console import Console
10	
11	# Force UTF-8 stdout on Windows (cp1252 can't encode box-drawing or non-ASCII chars).
12	if hasattr(sys.stdout, "buffer") and getattr(sys.stdout, "encoding", "utf-8").lower() not in ("utf-8", "utf8"):
13	    sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
14	if hasattr(sys.stderr, "buffer") and getattr(sys.stderr, "encoding", "utf-8").lower() not in ("utf-8", "utf8"):
15	    sys.stderr = io.TextIOWrapper(sys.stderr.buffer, encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
16	
17	app = typer.Typer(
18	    name="freelance-os",
19	    help="Freelance Revenue OS — AI prepares. Human commits.",
20	    no_args_is_help=True,
21	)
22	console = Console()

42	@app.command()
43	def init(
44	    force: bool = typer.Option(False, "--force", help="Drop and recreate all tables."),
45	    config: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--config", help="Path to settings.toml"),
46	):
47	    """Initialize the data directory and SQLite database (idempotent)."""
48	    import shutil
49	    from pathlib import Path
50	    from freelance_os.config import ConfigError, load_config
51	    from freelance_os.db import create_tables, drop_tables, get_engine
52	
53	    cfg_path = config or "config/settings.toml"
54	    try:
55	        cfg = load_config(cfg_path)
56	    except ConfigError as exc:
57	        console.print(f"[red]Config error:[/red] {exc}")
58	        raise typer.Exit(1)
59	
60	    db_path = cfg["paths"]["database_path"]
61	    engine = get_engine(db_path)
62	
63	    if force:
64	        drop_tables(engine)
65	        console.print("[yellow]Dropped existing tables (--force).[/yellow]")
66	
67	    create_tables(engine, db_path)
68	    console.print(f"[green]Database initialized:[/green] {db_path}")
69	    console.print("[green]All tables ready (idempotent).[/green]")
70	
71	    # Copy sources.example.yaml -> sources.yaml if absent.
72	    sources_example = Path("config/sources.example.yaml")
73	    sources_dest = Path("config/sources.yaml")
74	    if sources_example.exists() and not sources_dest.exists():
75	        shutil.copy2(sources_example, sources_dest)
76	        console.print(f"[green]Created:[/green] {sources_dest} (copied from example)")
77

133	@lead_app.command("ingest-email")
134	def lead_ingest_email(
135	    input: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--input", "-i", help=".eml or .mbox file path"),
136	    text: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--text", help="Raw email text (or use stdin)"),
137	    source: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--source", "-s", help="Override detected source platform"),
138	    config: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--config", help="Path to settings.toml"),
139	):
140	    """Parse job-alert emails (.eml, .mbox, pasted text/stdin) into leads."""
141	    import sys
142	    from pathlib import Path as _Path
143	    from freelance_os.config import load_config, ConfigError
144	    from freelance_os.db import get_engine
145	    from freelance_os.ingestion.email_parser import parse_eml_file, parse_mbox_file, parse_raw_text
146	    from freelance_os.ingestion.classify import classify_lead
147	    from freelance_os.models import Lead, LeadStatus
148	    from sqlmodel import Session, select
149	
150	    try:
151	        cfg = load_config(config or "config/settings.toml")
152	    except ConfigError as exc:
153	        console.print(f"[red]Config error:[/red] {exc}")
154	        raise typer.Exit(1)
155	
156	    raw_jobs = []
157	    if input is not None:
158	        p = _Path(input)
159	        if not p.exists():
160	            console.print(f"[red]File not found:[/red] {p}")
161	            raise typer.Exit(1)
162	        suffix = p.suffix.lower()
163	        if suffix == ".eml":
164	            raw_jobs = parse_eml_file(p, source_override=source)
165	        elif suffix == ".mbox":
166	            raw_jobs = parse_mbox_file(p, source_override=source)
167	        else:
168	            raw_jobs = parse_raw_text(p.read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace"), source)
169	    else:
170	        if text is None:
171	            if sys.stdin.isatty():
172	                console.print("[yellow]Paste email text, then press Ctrl+D:[/yellow]")
173	            text = sys.stdin.read().strip()
174	        if not text:
175	            console.print("[red]No input provided. Use --input FILE or --text TEXT.[/red]")
176	            raise typer.Exit(1)
177	        raw_jobs = parse_raw_text(text, source)
178	
179	    if not raw_jobs:
180	        console.print("[yellow]No job postings detected in input.[/yellow]")
181	        return
182	
183	    engine = get_engine(cfg["paths"]["database_path"])
184	    created, skipped = _save_email_leads(raw_jobs, engine)
185	    console.print(f"[green]Created {created} lead(s)[/green], [dim]skipped {skipped} duplicate(s).[/dim]")
186

190	    max_emails: int = typer.Option(50, "--max", help="Max emails to scan"),
191	    source: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--source", help="Override detected source platform"),
192	    config: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--config", help="Path to settings.toml"),

198	    """
199	    from freelance_os.config import load_config, ConfigError
200	    from freelance_os.db import get_engine
201	    from freelance_os.ingestion.imap_fetch import fetch_job_alert_emails
202	
203	    try:

213	        raise typer.Exit(1)

216	        console.print("[dim]No job alerts found in the configured mailbox.[/dim]")

218

223	
224	def _save_email_leads(raw_jobs: list, engine) -> tuple:
225	    """Dedup-check and insert email-parsed job leads. Returns (created, skipped)."""
226	    from freelance_os.ingestion.classify import classify_lead
227	    from freelance_os.models import Lead, LeadStatus
228	    from sqlmodel import Session, select
229	
230	    created, skipped = 0, 0
231	    with Session(engine) as session:
232	        for job in raw_jobs:
233	            if job.get("source_url"):
234	                if session.exec(select(Lead).where(Lead.source_url == job["source_url"])).first():
235	                    skipped += 1
236	                    continue
237	            elif job.get("source") and job.get("title"):
238	                if session.exec(
239	                    select(Lead)
240	                    .where(Lead.source == job["source"])
241	                    .where(Lead.title == job["title"])
242	                ).first():
243	                    skipped += 1
244	                    continue
245	
246	            classify_text = " ".join(filter(None, [job.get("title"), job.get("description")]))
247	            lead = Lead(
248	                source=job.get("source", "email"),
249	                source_url=job.get("source_url"),
250	                title=job.get("title"),
251	                description=job.get("description"),
252	                budget_type=job.get("budget_type"),
253	                budget_min=job.get("budget_min"),
254	                budget_max=job.get("budget_max"),
255	                hourly_min=job.get("hourly_min"),
256	                hourly_max=job.get("hourly_max"),
257	                status=LeadStatus.NEW,
258	                category=classify_lead(classify_text),
259	            )
260	            session.add(lead)
261	            created += 1
262	        session.commit()
263	    return created, skipped
264

266	@lead_app.command("list")
267	def lead_list(
268	    status: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--status", help="Filter by status"),
269	    category: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--category", help="Filter by category (e.g. WEB_APP)"),
270	    source: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--source", help="Filter by source platform"),
271	    decision: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--decision", help="Filter by decision (e.g. DRAFT_NOW)"),
272	    min_score: Optional[int] = typer.Option(None, "--min-score", help="Minimum lead score"),
273	    config: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--config", help="Path to settings.toml"),
274	):
275	    """List leads with optional filters."""
276	    from freelance_os.config import load_config, ConfigError
277	    from freelance_os.db import get_engine
278	    from freelance_os.models import Lead
279	    from sqlmodel import Session, select
280	    from rich.table import Table
281	
282	    try:
283	        cfg = load_config(config or "config/settings.toml")
284	    except ConfigError as exc:
285	        console.print(f"[red]Config error:[/red] {exc}")
286	        raise typer.Exit(1)
287	
288	    engine = get_engine(cfg["paths"]["database_path"])
289	    with Session(engine) as session:
290	        stmt = select(Lead)
291	        if status:
292	            stmt = stmt.where(Lead.status == status.upper())
293	        if category:
294	            stmt = stmt.where(Lead.category == category.upper())
295	        if source:
296	            stmt = stmt.where(Lead.source == source)
297	        if decision:
298	            stmt = stmt.where(Lead.decision == decision.upper())
299	        leads = session.exec(stmt).all()
300	
301	    if min_score is not None:
302	        leads = [l for l in leads if l.lead_score is not None and l.lead_score >= min_score]
303	
304	    if not leads:
305	        console.print("[dim]No leads found.[/dim]")
306	        return
307	
308	    table = Table(title="Leads", show_lines=False, box=rich_box.ASCII)
309	    table.add_column("ID", style="cyan", width=4)
310	    table.add_column("Cat", width=14)
311	    table.add_column("Status", style="yellow", width=16)
312	    table.add_column("Score", width=6)
313	    table.add_column("Decision", width=12)
314	    table.add_column("Effort", width=8)
315	    table.add_column("Conf", width=5)
316	    table.add_column("WF", width=3)
317	    table.add_column("Source", width=14)
318	    table.add_column("Title", style="white")
319	
320	    for lead in leads:
321	        effort = (
322	            f"{lead.effort_hours_low}-{lead.effort_hours_high}h"
323	            if lead.effort_hours_low is not None else "-"
324	        )
325	        conf = lead.feasibility_confidence or "-"
326	        wf = ("Y" if lead.warren_feasible else "N") if lead.warren_feasible is not None else "-"
327	        table.add_row(
328	            str(lead.id),
329	            lead.category or "OTHER",
330	            lead.status,
331	            str(lead.lead_score) if lead.lead_score is not None else "-",
332	            lead.decision or "-",
333	            effort,
334	            conf,
335	            wf,
336	            lead.source,
337	            (lead.title or lead.source_url or "(no title)")[:50],
338	        )
339	    console.print(table)
340

342	@lead_app.command("recategorize")
343	def lead_recategorize(
344	    lead_id: Optional[int] = typer.Argument(None, help="Lead ID to recategorize"),
345	    all_leads: bool = typer.Option(False, "--all", help="Recategorize all leads"),
346	    config: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--config", help="Path to settings.toml"),
347	):
348	    """Recategorize one lead or all leads using the keyword classifier."""
349	    from freelance_os.config import load_config, ConfigError
350	    from freelance_os.db import get_engine
351	    from freelance_os.models import Lead
352	    from freelance_os.ingestion.classify import classify_lead
353	    from sqlmodel import Session, select
354	
355	    try:
356	        cfg = load_config(config or "config/settings.toml")
357	    except ConfigError as exc:
358	        console.print(f"[red]Config error:[/red] {exc}")
359	        raise typer.Exit(1)
360	
361	    engine = get_engine(cfg["paths"]["database_path"])
362	
363	    with Session(engine) as session:
364	        if all_leads:
365	            leads = session.exec(select(Lead)).all()
366	        elif lead_id is not None:
367	            lead = session.get(Lead, lead_id)
368	            leads = [lead] if lead else []
369	        else:
370	            console.print("[red]Provide a LEAD_ID or --all.[/red]")
371	            raise typer.Exit(1)
372	
373	        updated = 0
374	        for lead in leads:
375	            text = " ".join(filter(None, [lead.title, lead.description]))
376	            new_cat = classify_lead(text)
377	            if lead.category != new_cat:
378	                lead.category = new_cat
379	                session.add(lead)
380	                updated += 1
381	        session.commit()
382	
383	    if all_leads:
384	        console.print(f"[green]Recategorized {updated} lead(s) (of {len(leads)} total).[/green]")
385	    else:
386	        console.print(f"[green]Lead #{lead_id} recategorized.[/green]")
387

481	@lead_app.command("score")
482	def lead_score(
483	    lead_id: Optional[int] = typer.Argument(None, help="Lead ID to score"),
484	    all_new: bool = typer.Option(False, "--all-new", help="Score all NEW leads"),
485	    config: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--config", help="Path to settings.toml"),
486	):
487	    """Score one lead or all NEW leads."""
488	    from freelance_os.config import load_config, ConfigError
489	    from freelance_os.db import get_engine
490	    from freelance_os.models import Lead, LeadStatus
491	    from freelance_os.scoring.lead_scorer import score_lead
492	    from sqlmodel import Session, select
493	
494	    try:
495	        cfg = load_config(config or "config/settings.toml")
496	    except ConfigError as exc:
497	        console.print(f"[red]Config error:[/red] {exc}")
498	        raise typer.Exit(1)
499	
500	    engine = get_engine(cfg["paths"]["database_path"])
501	
502	    if all_new:
503	        with Session(engine) as session:
504	            leads = session.exec(select(Lead).where(Lead.status == LeadStatus.NEW)).all()
505	        if not leads:
506	            console.print("[dim]No NEW leads to score.[/dim]")
507	            return
508	        for lead in leads:
509	            _do_score(lead.id, engine, cfg)
510	    elif lead_id is not None:
511	        _do_score(lead_id, engine, cfg)
512	    else:
513	        console.print("[red]Provide a LEAD_ID or --all-new.[/red]")
514	        raise typer.Exit(1)

516	
517	def _do_score(lead_id: int, engine, cfg: dict) -> None:
518	    import json as _json
519	    from freelance_os.models import Lead, LeadStatus
520	    from freelance_os.scoring.lead_scorer import score_lead
521	    from sqlmodel import Session
522	
523	    with Session(engine) as session:
524	        lead = session.get(Lead, lead_id)
525	        if lead is None:
526	            console.print(f"[red]Lead #{lead_id} not found.[/red]")
527	            return
528	        result = score_lead(lead, cfg)
529	        lead.lead_score = result["lead_score"]
530	        lead.risk_score = result["risk_score"]
531	        lead.decision = result["decision"]
532	        lead.reason_codes = _json.dumps(result["reason_codes"])
533	        lead.status = LeadStatus.SCORED
534	        session.add(lead)
535	        session.commit()
536	
537	    console.print(
538	        f"[green]Lead #{lead_id}[/green] score={result['lead_score']} "
539	        f"risk={result['risk_score']} decision={result['decision']} "
540	        f"reasons={result['reason_codes']}"
541	    )
542

547	    all_leads: bool = typer.Option(False, "--all", help="Estimate all leads"),
548	    config: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--config", help="Path to settings.toml"),
549	):
550	    """Estimate feasibility, effort, price, and turnaround for lead(s)."""
551	    from freelance_os.config import load_config, ConfigError
552	    from freelance_os.db import get_engine
553	    from freelance_os.models import Lead
554	    from freelance_os.scoring.feasibility import estimate_feasibility
555	    from sqlmodel import Session, select
556	
557	    try:
558	        cfg = load_config(config or "config/settings.toml")
559	    except ConfigError as exc:
560	        console.print(f"[red]Config error:[/red] {exc}")
561	        raise typer.Exit(1)
562	
563	    engine = get_engine(cfg["paths"]["database_path"])
564	
565	    if all_leads:
566	        with Session(engine) as session:
567	            leads = session.exec(select(Lead)).all()
568	        if not leads:
569	            console.print("[dim]No leads to estimate.[/dim]")
570	            return
571	        for lead in leads:
572	            _do_estimate(lead.id, engine, cfg)
573	    elif lead_id is not None:
574	        _do_estimate(lead_id, engine, cfg)
575	    else:
576	        console.print("[red]Provide a LEAD_ID or --all.[/red]")
577	        raise typer.Exit(1)
578	
579	
580	def _do_estimate(lead_id: int, engine, cfg: dict) -> None:
581	    from freelance_os.models import Lead
582	    from freelance_os.scoring.feasibility import estimate_feasibility
583	    from sqlmodel import Session
584	
585	    with Session(engine) as session:
586	        lead = session.get(Lead, lead_id)
587	        if lead is None:
588	            console.print(f"[red]Lead #{lead_id} not found.[/red]")
589	            return
590	        result = estimate_feasibility(lead, cfg)
591	        lead.effort_hours_low = result["effort_hours_low"]
592	        lead.effort_hours_high = result["effort_hours_high"]
593	        lead.feasibility_confidence = result["feasibility_confidence"]
594	        lead.warren_feasible = result["warren_feasible"]
595	        lead.suggested_price = result["suggested_price"]
596	        lead.suggested_turnaround_days = result["suggested_turnaround_days"]
597	        session.add(lead)
598	        session.commit()
599	
600	    wf = "yes" if result["warren_feasible"] else "no"
601	    console.print(
602	        f"[green]Lead #{lead_id}[/green] effort={result['effort_hours_low']}-{result['effort_hours_high']}h "
603	        f"conf={result['feasibility_confidence']} warren_feasible={wf} "
604	        f"price=${result['suggested_price']:.0f} turnaround={result['suggested_turnaround_days']}d"
605	    )

656	def lead_validate_draft(
657	    lead_id: int = typer.Argument(..., help="Lead ID"),
658	    config: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--config", help="Path to settings.toml"),
659	):
660	    """Validate the latest proposal draft for a lead."""
661	    from freelance_os.config import load_config, ConfigError
662	    from freelance_os.db import get_engine
663	    from freelance_os.models import ProposalDraft
664	    from freelance_os.proposal.proposal_validator import validate_draft
665	    from sqlmodel import Session, select
666	
667	    try:
668	        cfg = load_config(config or "config/settings.toml")
669	    except ConfigError as exc:
670	        console.print(f"[red]Config error:[/red] {exc}")
671	        raise typer.Exit(1)
672	
673	    engine = get_engine(cfg["paths"]["database_path"])
674	    with Session(engine) as session:
675	        draft = session.exec(
676	            select(ProposalDraft)
677	            .where(ProposalDraft.lead_id == lead_id)
678	            .order_by(ProposalDraft.version.desc())
679	        ).first()
680	
681	        if draft is None:
682	            console.print(f"[red]No draft found for Lead #{lead_id}. Run 'lead draft {lead_id}' first.[/red]")
683	            raise typer.Exit(1)
684	
685	        result = validate_draft(draft, cfg)
686	        status_color = {"PASS": "green", "WARN": "yellow", "FAIL": "red"}.get(result["status"], "white")
687	        console.print(f"\n[{status_color}]Validation: {result['status']}[/{status_color}]")
688	        if result.get("reasons"):
689	            for r in result["reasons"]:
690	                console.print(f"  - {r}")
691	
692	        import json as _json
693	        draft.validator_flags = _json.dumps(result)
694	        session.add(draft)
695	        session.commit()

698	@lead_app.command("review")
699	def lead_review(
700	    config: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--config", help="Path to settings.toml"),
701	):
702	    """Interactive review queue for scored leads."""
703	    from freelance_os.config import load_config, ConfigError
704	    from freelance_os.db import get_engine
705	    from freelance_os.models import Lead, LeadStatus, Decision
706	    from sqlmodel import Session, select
707	    import json as _json
708	
709	    try:
710	        cfg = load_config(config or "config/settings.toml")
711	    except ConfigError as exc:
712	        console.print(f"[red]Config error:[/red] {exc}")
713	        raise typer.Exit(1)
714	
715	    engine = get_engine(cfg["paths"]["database_path"])
716	    with Session(engine) as session:
717	        leads = session.exec(
718	            select(Lead).where(Lead.status == LeadStatus.SCORED)
719	        ).all()
720	
721	    if not leads:
722	        console.print("[dim]No SCORED leads to review.[/dim]")
723	        return
724	
725	    for lead in leads:
726	        console.print(f"\n[bold cyan]Lead #{lead.id}[/bold cyan]")
727	        console.print(f"  Source: {lead.source}")
728	        console.print(f"  Title:  {lead.title or lead.source_url or '(no title)'}")
729	        console.print(f"  Score:  {lead.lead_score}  Decision: {lead.decision}")
730	        if lead.reason_codes:
731	            codes = _json.loads(lead.reason_codes)
732	            console.print(f"  Why:    {', '.join(codes)}")
733	        console.print("\n  [a]pprove  [r]eject  [w]atch  [s]kip  [q]uit")
734	        choice = input("  > ").strip().lower()
735	        if choice == "q":
736	            break
737	        elif choice == "a":
738	            with Session(engine) as session:
739	                l = session.get(Lead, lead.id)
740	                l.status = LeadStatus.APPROVED_TO_APPLY
741	                session.add(l)
742	                session.commit()
743	            console.print(f"[green]Lead #{lead.id} approved.[/green]")
744	        elif choice == "r":
745	            with Session(engine) as session:
746	                l = session.get(Lead, lead.id)
747	                l.status = LeadStatus.REJECTED
748	                session.add(l)
749	                session.commit()
750	            console.print(f"[yellow]Lead #{lead.id} rejected.[/yellow]")
751	        elif choice == "w":
752	            with Session(engine) as session:
753	                l = session.get(Lead, lead.id)
754	                l.decision = Decision.WATCH
755	                session.add(l)
756	                session.commit()
757	            console.print(f"[dim]Lead #{lead.id} set to WATCH.[/dim]")
758

929	    config: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--config", help="Path to settings.toml"),
930	):
931	    """Record the outcome for a lead interactively."""
932	    from freelance_os.config import load_config, ConfigError
933	    from freelance_os.db import get_engine
934	    from freelance_os.models import Lead, Outcome, OutcomeResult
935	    from sqlmodel import Session
936	
937	    try:
938	        cfg = load_config(config or "config/settings.toml")
939	    except ConfigError as exc:
940	        console.print(f"[red]Config error:[/red] {exc}")
941	        raise typer.Exit(1)
942	
943	    engine = get_engine(cfg["paths"]["database_path"])
944	    with Session(engine) as session:

946	        if lead is None:
947	            console.print(f"[red]Lead #{lead_id} not found.[/red]")
948	            raise typer.Exit(1)
949

963	    final_budget = float(budget_str) if budget_str else None
964	    console.print("Hours spent (optional, number): ", end="")

967	    console.print("Lessons learned (optional): ", end="")
968	    lessons = input().strip() or None
969	
970	    with Session(engine) as session:

972	            lead_id=lead_id,

974	            reason=reason,
975	            final_budget=final_budget,
976	            time_spent_hours=time_spent,
977	            lessons=lessons,
978	        )
979	        session.add(outcome)
980	        session.commit()
981	        session.refresh(outcome)
982	        console.print(f"[green]Outcome #{outcome.id} recorded.[/green]")

990	def tune(
991	    port: int = typer.Option(8765, "--port", "-p", help="Local port to bind (127.0.0.1 only)"),
992	    no_browser: bool = typer.Option(False, "--no-browser", help="Do not open browser automatically"),
993	    config: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, "--config", help="Path to settings.toml"),
994	):
995	    """Launch the metric-tuning web console on 127.0.0.1.
996	
997	    Adjust scoring weights, penalties, and thresholds; see live impact on all leads.
998	    """
999	    import webbrowser
1000	    import uvicorn  # type: ignore[import]
1001	    from freelance_os.config import load_config, ConfigError
1002	    from freelance_os.tuner.app import app as tuner_app, configure
1003	
1004	    try:
1005	        cfg = load_config(config or "config/settings.toml")
1006	    except ConfigError as exc:
1007	        console.print(f"[red]Config error:[/red] {exc}")
1008	        raise typer.Exit(1)
1009	
1010	    db_path = cfg["paths"]["database_path"]
1011	    scoring_rules_path = "config/scoring_rules.toml"
1012	
1013	    configure(db_path=db_path, scoring_rules_path=scoring_rules_path)
1014	
1015	    url = f"http://127.0.0.1:{port}"
1016	    console.print(f"[green]Metric Tuning Console:[/green] {url}")
1017	    console.print("[dim]Press Ctrl+C to stop.[/dim]")
1018	
1019	    if not no_browser:
1020	        import threading
1021	        def _open():
1022	            import time
1023	            time.sleep(0.8)
1024	            webbrowser.open(url)
1025	        threading.Thread(target=_open, daemon=True).start()
1026	
1027	    uvicorn.run(tuner_app, host="127.0.0.1", port=port, log_level="warning")
